testcase.name: PriceCalculator root container uses canonical fp-glass surface
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-glass p-6 rounded-lg"........passed

testcase.name: PriceCalculator source has zero raw Tailwind palette classes
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the raw Tailwind palette class count should equal 0....................passed

testcase.name: PriceCalculator numeric inputs use canonical fp-input class
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-input w-28 text-right".......passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-input w-20 text-right"........passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-input w-24 text-right"........passed

testcase.name: PriceCalculator action buttons use canonical fp-btn-* variants
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-btn-primary text-xs px-3 py-1.5"..passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-btn-ghost text-xs px-3 py-1.5"..passed

testcase.name: PriceCalculator alert banners use canonical fp-alert-* variants
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-alert-warn px-4 py-3"........passed And the source should contain the pattern "fp-alert-danger px-4 py-3".......passed

testcase.name: Range slider uses canonical accent-color without palette class
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "accentColor: '#7c3aed'".........passed And the source should not contain the pattern "accent-purple-"..............passed

testcase.name: Listing detail page renders PriceCalculator on a canonical glass surface
testcase.system-out: Given I am logged in........................................................passed And the "/api/listings/mock-listing-14-6" route returns a mocked listing with optimal pricing..passed When I load the "/listings/mock-listing-14-6" route in the browser..........passed Then an element matching "[data-testid='price-calculator']" with class "fp-glass" is visible..passed And the element "[data-testid='price-calculator-hero']" has aria-live "polite"..passed And the slider "#price-calc-margin-slider" has aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow, and aria-valuetext populated..passed

testcase.name: PriceCalculator best-platform badge uses canonical fp-badge-purple
testcase.system-out: Given the source file "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx" exists...........passed When I read the source of "src/components/PriceCalculator.tsx"..............passed Then the source should contain the pattern "fp-badge fp-badge-purple".......passed
